$meta.name: linden_tar — Music Box Doll Builder color tokens
$meta.description: Gallery-grade palette inspired by Olga Grechanova's ceramic doll work. Warm near-black vitrine backgrounds, gypsum/porcelain whites, blood-crimson, burnt-orange flesh accents, ceramic-green glaze. Built for a dark-first mobile UI.

ink.$comment: Warm near-black background scale. Not pure #000 — carries a faint clay warmth, like an unlit gallery.

950.note: Deepest base — page background, behind everything.

800.note: Raised surface — cards, panels, vitrine interior.

700.note: Higher surface / pressed states / input fills.

porcelain.$comment: Gypsum / bone / glaze whites. Never #FFF — always slightly warm and dimmed, like fired clay under low light.

50.note: Primary text on dark — warm bone white.

crimson.$comment: Blood-crimson — the red hooded cloak and red-glazed lips. The single loud color; use sparingly as the call to action.

ember.$comment: Burnt-orange flesh / lip accent. Warm secondary, used for soft highlights and warnings.

verdigris.$comment: Ceramic-green glaze — green-painted brows, sage glaze. Cool counterpoint to the warm palette; success / selected.

clay.$comment: Muted flesh / clay tone — neutral warm midtone for soft surfaces and progress.

scrim.note: Backdrop behind modals — dims the gallery.

glaze.note: Porcelain edge highlight — top of raised surfaces, vitrine frame.

primary.note: Body text on dark. Contrast vs #12100D ≈ 13.4:1 (AAA).

muted.note: Captions, labels. Contrast vs #12100D ≈ 6.6:1 (AA, AAA for large).

faint.note: Placeholder / disabled. Contrast vs #12100D ≈ 3.9:1 — large text / non-essential only.

onCrimson.note: Text on crimson CTA. Contrast vs #A11D2C ≈ 6.3:1 (AA).

link.note: Inline links on dark. Contrast vs #12100D ≈ 4.9:1 (AA).

subtle.note: Crimson tint fill — selected chip, soft badge.

clay.note: Neutral warm accent — progress track fill.

stage.$comment: Tokens for the 3D doll stage / vitrine — see README for material guidance.

vitrineFloor.note: Floor of the 3D stage — darker than the app bg.

spotlight.note: Dim overhead gallery light — radial glow center-top.

gypsum.note: Base albedo for gypsum/porcelain doll material.

rimLight.note: Warm rim light grazing the doll edge.
